title: Section 18B
content: 1[18B. Punishment for recruiting of any person or persons for terrorist act.—Whoever recruits or causes to be recruited any person or persons for commission of a terrorist act shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than five years but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 7, ibid., for Chapter IV (w.e.f. 21-9-2004).
